class.help: Tabla codificadora de Modalidades de Contratación
class.label: Modalidad
class.name: MOD_CONTR

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mod_contr as oi_mod_contr, t0.c_mod_contr as c_mod_contr, t0.d_mod_contr as d_mod_contr, SEC.policy, t0.c_mod_contr as CODE, t0.d_mod_contr as TEXT FROM SDP21_MOD_CONTR as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.ModalidadesContratacion.MOD_CONTR\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mod_contr LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mod_contr asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_mod_contr as oi_mod_contr, SEC.policy FROM SDP21_MOD_CONTR as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.ModalidadesContratacion.MOD_CONTR\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_mod_contr LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_mod_contr asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Título del Curso. Puede ser un alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Descripción
attribute.name: d_mod_contr

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.ModalidadesContratacion.MOD_CONTR.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.ModalidadesContratacion.MOD_CONTR.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP21_MOD_CONTR.oi_mod_contr) as CNT from SDP21_MOD_CONTR Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP21_MOD_CONTR.oi_mod_contr={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP21_MOD_CONTR.d_mod_contr,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP21_MOD_CONTR.c_mod_contr,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
